decision_tree.description: A standard branching logic flowchart. Useful for historical analysis, ethical dilemmas, or clinical triage redesigns.

system_map.description: A complex structural flowchart with subgraphs and database nodes. Useful for mapping biology pathways, sociological structures, or engineering architectures.

entity_relationship.description: An ER diagram mapping data entities and relationships. Useful for database design, taxonomy mapping, or literary character relationship webs.

state_machine.description: A state diagram showing transitions between distinct states. Useful for defining lifecycle stages, political regime shifts, or chemical reactions.

sequence_diagram.description: A sequence diagram plotting interactions between actors over time. Useful for historical timelines, network protocols, or narrative plot progression.

class_diagram.description: A class diagram showing inheritance and composition. Useful for biological taxonomies, organizational hierarchies, or object-oriented programming.

user_journey.description: A user journey map tracking tasks and emotional states. Useful for UX design, patient journey mapping, or analyzing a protagonist's arc.

gantt_chart.description: A Gantt chart tracking project timelines and dependencies. Useful for project management, historical event timelines, or strategic planning.

mindmap.description: A central-hub mindmap. Useful for brainstorming, concept clustering, or outlining the key themes of a text.

quadrant_chart.description: A 2x2 quadrant chart. Useful for SWOT analysis, risk assessment matrices, or political compass mapping.
